title: The Big Combo (Growth DeFi - REKT)
relevance_summary: Liquidity manipulation followed by withdrawal on DeFi protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that removes liquidity from Uniswap after interacting with a staking contract

red_flags: Staking contract interaction followed by liquidity removal
summary: Growth DeFi fell victim to a liquidity manipulation attack where a fake token was used to drain liquidity from Uniswap. A guard could have blocked such transactions by monitoring interactions between staking contracts and Uniswap liquidity removal.
